程序包 com.gdxsoft.easyweb.cache

类 SqlCachedRedisBase

java.lang.Object
com.gdxsoft.easyweb.cache.SqlCachedRedisBase
所有已实现的接口:
ISqlCached
直接已知子类:
SqlCachedRedisImpl, SqlCachedRedisSingleImpl
public abstract class SqlCachedRedisBase extends Object implements ISqlCached
单点redis的操作
作者:
admin
